lessons.title: When Things Break 💥
lessons.description: Understand what an Exception is and why apps magically crash.

lessons.title: Try / Catch 🪂
lessons.description: Deploy a safety parachute to catch the crash before it hits the ground.

lessons.title: The Finally Block 🧹
lessons.description: Guarantee cleanup code runs, even if the world is burning.

lessons.title: Throwing Errors 🚀
lessons.description: How to forcefully crash your own code when someone breaks the rules.
